arts.ttl: Former Juventus and Roma midfielder Miralem Pjanic joins CSKA Moscow
arts.sum: Former Juventus and Roma midfielder Miralem Pjanic has embarked on a new adventure in Russian football, signing with CSKA Moscow until June 30, 2025. The 33-year-old Bosnian international, who had been a free agent following his stint with FC Sharjah in the UAE, has chosen to continue his career in the Russian Premier League. Pjanic’s move to CSKA Moscow comes after speculation linking him with a return to Italian football, particularly with Genoa, who were reportedly interested in the midfielder following Malinovskyi’s serious injury in Venice. arts.ttl: Inaki Williams: Nico Williams made “right decision” to reject Barcelona in favour of Athletic Club stay
arts.sum: Nico Williams dominated transfer news stories over the summer, as he was relentlessly linked with moves to Barcelona and the Premier League. In the end, the 21-year-old stayed put at Athletic Club for at least one more season.
